name: Pool Filter Pump Calculator
seo_description: Pool Filtration Calculator. Pool length, Pool width, Average depth — get Pool volume, Pump flow rate, Filter area instantly for your plumbing and water.
example_label: Calculate filter pump for 8x4m pool with 1.5m average depth, 2 daily turnovers.

range_hints.profundidad_media_m: Promedio between depth mínima and máxima
range_hints.turnos_dia: Veces que se filtra el volume total per día (2-4 turnos)

result_context: Piscina of {volumen_m3} m³ ({volumen_litros} L) requires filter of {caudal_m3h} m³/h to {turnos_dia} turnos/day. time of filtrado: {tiempo_horas} hours.
formula_display: Volume = largo × width × depth; Caudal = volume × turnos ÷ 24h
mistakes: No Calculate time of filtrado according to temporada (more in verano)
No prever limpieza of filtros when manómetro indica saturación
description: Pool filter pump sizing based on pool volume and turnover rate.
desc: Pool Filtration Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
